subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Lord my God! Thou seest that mankind hath arisen against me for my having imparted to them that which Thou hast commanded me in Thy sovereignty
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری العباد قاموا علی بما بلغتهم ما امرتنی به بسلطانک و کلما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
